VariableCommand.name: BatteryTime
VariableCommand.expression: ifelse(ge(@__miui_version_code,13),ifelse(#battery_state==1,'Est. '+ifelse(ge(int(#_leftChargeTime/3600000),1),int(#_leftChargeTime/3600000)+'h','')+int((#_leftChargeTime%3600000)/60000)+'m to full','Est. battery life'+ifelse(ge(int(#_enduranceTime/3600000),0),int(#_enduranceTime/3600000)+'h','')+int((#_enduranceTime%3600000)/60000)+'m'),ifelse(ge(#battery_level,0)*le(#battery_level,20),'Battery too low',gt(#battery_level,20)*le(#battery_level,50),'Battery low',gt(#battery_level,50)*le(#battery_level,70),'Battery normal',gt(#battery_level,70)*le(#battery_level,99),'Battery full','Fully charged'))

Var.expression: ifelse(lt(#time,60000),'ss ',lt(#time,3600000),'mm p ss',lt(#time,86400000),'k h mm m','d d k h')
Var.name: powerOnTime

Var.expression: ifelse(lt(#time,60000),'ss ',lt(#time,3600000),'mm p ss',lt(#time,86400000),'k h mm m','d d k h')
Var.name: powerOnTime2

Text.name: widgetordertips
Text.textExp: ifelse(#funcard_vis,'Cannot adjust widgets when custom widgets are enabled',@widgetorder_text)

Text.name: no_js_tips
Text.text: Depth effect cannot be enabled when wallpaper blur is on!

Text.name: no_card_tips
Text.text: When enabled, music and notifications will display at the bottom, and widgets will display at the top.

Text.name: talltime_tips_w
Text.text: When using large clock, music and notifications can only be displayed at the bottom

Text.textExp: ifelse(#PPMove_01,'↓↓Scroll down to hide↓↓','↑↑Swipe up to show↓↓')
ifelse(#wallpaper_auto==1,'Auto-switch wallpaper every minute',#wallpaper_auto==2,'Auto change wallpaper hourly',#wallpaper_auto==3,'Auto change wallpaper daily',' ')
substr('SUN MON TUE WED THU FRI SAT',#__i*3,3)

Text.text: unlock and lock screen to load wallpaper.
